title: Agent management row actions and layout
description: Fix the agent management table header/layout, make maintenance mode explicit and reversible from each row, and hide enrollment decision buttons after approval or rejection.
acceptance_criteria: The agent management table header no longer overlays or collides with row content.
Approved agents show a row action to enter maintenance when not paused and resume when in maintenance.
The server exposes maintenance state through /api/agents and updates it from pause/resume acknowledgements.
Approve/reject buttons are only shown while enrollment is pending.
Rejected agents show delete as the only useful action.
Docs, changelog, and version are updated.

tasks.title: Model maintenance state
tasks.description: Add maintenance to AgentRecord, SQLite persistence, API JSON, dashboard models, and status grouping.
acceptance_criteria: Existing databases migrate a maintenance column.
Pause ACK sets maintenance=true and resume ACK sets maintenance=false.
Dashboard status can classify maintenance agents.

unit: GIVEN backend agent records WHEN dashboard rows are built THEN maintenance state is preserved and represented.
integration: Existing server-agent integration continues passing after schema expansion.

tasks.implementation_notes: Server::handle_router_frame already tracks dispatched command ids; extend the ACK handling for PAUSE and RESUME.

tasks.title: Update row actions
tasks.description: Add UI action helper tests and update dashboard/src/main.tsx so enrollment actions only render for pending agents, maintenance toggles between pause/resume, and rejected rows only offer delete.
acceptance_criteria: Pending rows show approve and reject.
Approved/rejected rows do not show approve/reject.
Approved rows show maintenance or resume based on maintenance state.
Rejected rows do not show settings or operational commands.

unit: GIVEN pending, approved, maintenance, and rejected agents WHEN UI action helpers are evaluated THEN the expected actions are available.

tasks.implementation_notes: Use a small dashboard/src/agentActions.ts helper module to keep behavior testable without DOM tooling.

tasks.title: Fix management table layout
tasks.description: Adjust CSS for the management table so headers are not sticky over row content, columns have stable widths, and row content wraps cleanly.
acceptance_criteria: Management table uses a stable minimum width for horizontal scrolling.
Management table header is not sticky over the first data row.
Button groups and settings controls wrap without colliding with neighboring cells.
tasks.implementation_notes: Scope CSS overrides to .management-table to avoid changing the overview table behavior.

tasks.title: Update release notes and docs
tasks.description: Bump MODULE.bazel, update CHANGELOG.md, and describe connected/maintenance/enrollment behavior in docs/dashboard.md.
acceptance_criteria: Changelog records layout, maintenance, and enrollment action changes.
Dashboard docs describe pending-only enrollment controls and maintenance state.
tasks.implementation_notes: Keep the docs concise and operator-focused.

edges.label: UI actions need persisted maintenance state.
